display.name: Companion
display.summary: Manage local SKILL.md packages with Companion.
display.description: Validate, publish, update, resolve dependencies, declare setup requirements, choose a skill owner (Personal or team), audit versions, install updates, and self-update the bundled Companion skill through the workspace API.

requirements.note: Workspace API base URL. The install/use prompt stores this in ~/.companion/credentials.json when the environment variable is not set.
Personal access token scoped to skills:read and skills:write. The install/use prompt stores this in ~/.companion/credentials.json when the environment variable is not set.
